title: Router Monitor
text: Router Monitor The Router Monitor is a console that enables you to monitor the activities of your Uniface Router. You can also view and configure all Uniface client and server processes that are registered with that Router. Synonyms: Uniface Router Monitor The UROUTMON API is an internal Uniface component that allows you to write your own 4GL Uniface Router monitor to access and modify the Uniface Router's parameters and settings.
